programs.desc: Amanda Lacaze, CEO and Managing Director of Lynas Rare Earths speaks about \.

programs.title: Media Watch
programs.desc: Australia's leading forum for media analysis and comment. Host Linton Besser, a four-time Walkley award-winning investigative reporter and former foreign correspondent, brings you a fearless critique of the week's journalism.

programs.title: Spicks and Specks
programs.sub_title: Fanny Lumsden, Shane Jacobson, Elly-may Barnes & Courtney Act
programs.desc: You want great guests? No problem. Adam, Myf and Alan are joined by Fanny Lumsden, Shane Jacobson, Elly-May Barnes and Courtney Act. You want a spine chilling closer? No problem again. Folk Bitch Trio will stun you.

programs.title: Anh's Brush With Fame
programs.desc: Anh paints celebrity chef Kylie Kwong, who was born to cook. She shares stories from her childhood in suburban Sydney and deeply spiritual return to her ancestral village in China.

programs.title: Grand Designs Australia
programs.desc: A homeowner takes a tiny rundown heritage-listed workers cottage in the middle of the dense inner city Sydney suburb of Newtown and transforms it into a beautiful, fully sustainable off-grid home. (Final).

programs.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programs.desc: Detective Murdoch investigates the strange death of a man who either jumped from or pushed off of his balcony, which Murdoch finds suspicious; among his list of suspects are the deceaseds brothers, and the help have different stories.
